summary:
Properly finishing and polishing amalgam restorations enhances their aesthetics and improves sealing, reducing microleakage which helps prevent corrosion and tarnish. This process ensures better long-term performance and durability of the dental filling. The main focus here should be on how this procedure affects the longevity and integrity of the restoration by improving its physical properties like seal and preventing degradation due to environmental factors such as saliva exposure over time.
